creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
I can confirm the correct plist!

But i get the following warning when trying to build the port:

===>  Cleaning for piwik-2.16.2
/!\ piwik-2.16.2: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Using USE_PHP alone is deprecated, please use USES=php

May you consider fixing this one?
